summary: Completed backend API testing for Student Mobile App. All 15 tests passed (100%). Public preview URL is unavailable (404), but internal backend APIs work correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Preview URL (https://attendance-track-38.preview.emergentagent.com) returns 404. This is a platform-level routing issue, not an app bug.

critical_code_review_comments: All backend APIs for student mobile app are working correctly
Student login with role=student validation works
Non-student rejection logic is correctly implemented in login.tsx (frontend)
QR code generation working - student has valid QR: SHARIA-234-26056656
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs pass. Student user 234 has: department_id=698e500997fef774e66e93a8, level=3, section=ب, qr_code=SHARIA-234-26056656. The student has 6 unread notifications and 0 attendance sessions. 4 courses and 4 departments exist in the system.

verified_features.GET /api/students/me: PASS - returns student_id, full_name, department_id, level, section, qr_code
verified_features.GET /api/settings: PASS - returns college_name, max_absence_percent, academic_year, etc.
verified_features.GET /api/notifications/my: PASS - returns notifications with total (6), unread_count (6)
